ab: Apay, gaga su sapah hug?
en: Apay, are you home?

ab: Niqan, tmay ruwan sapah.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: Apay, gaga su sapah hug?
en: Apay, are you home?

ab: Ungat hini ka Apay. Yuku o Ipay. Manu kari su? Nasi miyah do rngangun muda.
ch: B:Apay不在家耶。我是Ipay，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告Apay。
en: Apay is not at home. I am Ipay. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: Ima namu?
en: Who are you?

ab: Payi! Iyang ku ni Ipay wah! rwahi nami rhngun!
ch: B:奶奶！我們是Iyang 和 Ipay，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are Iyang and Ipay, please open the door for us.

ab: Ima?
en: Who is it?

ab: Yaku o Buya, Miyah ku miing Utay.
en: I am Buya, I am here for Utay.

ab: Payi, miyah ku qmita sunan.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: Bsiyaq su bi ini iyah da. Lnglungun misu balay.
ch: A:你好久沒來了。我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Api, Miyah ku miing sunan.
en: Api, I am here to play with you.

ab: Tmay sapah nhari. Tmaga ku bsiyaq da.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: Nhuma mu ka bunga nii, ekan binaw!
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: Tayal knsibus ka bunga nii.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: Iyah! Nhuma mu nanak ka hiyi pnegalang nii. ekan binaw.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: Tayal knsibus ka hiyi qhuni nii.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: Tluung! Nhuma mu nanak ka sqmu nii ini rusi sapuh!
ch: A:請坐!這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: Wu! Tayal knsibus ka sqmu nii.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: Ekan su mami hug?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: Ini ku tduwa mkan mami. ekan ku supaw do kida.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: Ekan su emmu hug?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: Iq wah, smkuxul ku balay.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: Qlisi misu hiyi pnegalang.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: Mhway su balay. shiya bi ka hiyi qhuni nii.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: Imah ka qsiya nii.
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: Mhuway su balay.
en: Thank you.

ab: Ququ mkan, Lala bi damat hnapuy mu.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: Wu! Shiya balay ni malu bi uqun.
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: Ququ mkan, Lala bi ka hini na.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: Aji ku qsiqa do!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: Ququ mkan, Lala bi ka hini na.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: Wada ku mkan lala bi da. Aji ku tduwa mkan da.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
